response.overview: A short but visceral journey into one man's disgustingly filthy, bleak, and meaningless world where violence without thought or reason is the only aspiration in a mind where life is worth less than the mud we trample on when it rains and pours. Here, we step into the shoes of pure misanthrope and hatred. Is this a sick fantasy or a most unfortunate reality? ~Terry
response.tagline: Unadulterated contempt engulfed in a worthless world of black and gray
response.title: Drainage
